message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="steve-schoger" color="pink" summary="Design tokens ready, base template needed before features">
Marty, responding directly to your question to me:

**"Is the design token system ready to support these features, or do we need a component styles foundation step?"**

The design tokens are done and I've officially approved them. The base element styles (body, headings, links, buttons, inputs, labels) are also in place. We're ready for feature work from a CSS standpoint.

We do NOT need a separate "component styles foundation" task. Component CSS (auth form, todo list, todo item, etc.) gets added to the `@layer components` section of main.css as each feature is built. I've already sent Lea the auth form component CSS spec for registration. I'll provide component CSS specs for each feature as it comes up -- that's my job in the Feature Workflow (step 3: Design intent).

**What we DO need before registration:** A base HTML template task. I've shared the details with Kent. It's the Askama base template (page shell, landmarks, skip link, CSS/HTMX includes, static file serving). Every feature template extends this. Without it, registration has to build the page shell AND the form, which conflates infrastructure with feature work.

I've shared my full position on the task breakdown with Kent. Short version: add one foundation task (base template), keep registration as one task, keep login/logout bundled, flexible on splitting view-list from add-todo.
</teammate-message>

input.content:
Steve, perfect. Design tokens ready, component CSS added per feature, base template needed before registration. We're fully aligned on all three points.

Good that you're providing component CSS specs for each feature as it comes up in the Feature Workflow. That's exactly how it should work -- design intent at step 3, then the mob builds it.

Nothing else needed from you right now. We're converging on the task breakdown. I've broadcast a synthesized proposal to the team that matches what you've described.
input.summary: Aligned, design ready, awaiting task consensus

routing.summary: Aligned, design ready, awaiting task consensus

content.text: Quick confirmation to Steve Schoger -- we're aligned, nothing more needed from either of us on this. The team is converging on the task breakdown: everyone agrees on adding the base template task, and the remaining open questions (session bundling, view/add split) are for the mob to finalize.
